functions.name: FUN_0004910f
functions.basis: unnamed, VA in HMI/GDV driver region

functions.name: FUN_00049587
functions.basis: unnamed, VA in HMI/GDV driver region

render_world.label: 3D world renderer
render_world.summary: Scene-tree walk, sector/wall/floor-ceiling/sprite passes, span+column texture mappers, projection, reflection/mirror subpass, parallax sky. Sub-layers: scene walk / face passes / span+column fill drivers.

video_display.label: Video mode & display output
video_display.summary: VESA/VGA/Mode-X mode set, page flip, palette DAC upload, banks, hires line-doubling, dirty-rect present pipeline, framebuffer surfaces, palette remap LUTs.

blit_2d.label: 2D blit & framebuffer primitives
blit_2d.summary: Sprite/cursor/overlay blitters, save-under, translucent/transparent span fills, RLE byterun decode, framebuffer rect ops (non-3D drawing).

text_font.label: Text & font rendering
text_font.summary: Glyph rasterization, shadowed/outlined text, font metrics, text-to-buffer.

gdv_cutscene.label: GDV cutscene playback
gdv_cutscene.summary: Gremlin Digital Video decode (video + DPCM audio), playback loop, fades, mode setup, frame present.

das_assets.label: DAS asset cache & sprite/animation
das_assets.summary: DAS handle cache (Pool-backed, relocatable), block load/evict/repair, sprite frame decode + delta-stream codec, rescale, palette read.

raw_command_system.label: RAW map-command system
raw_command_system.summary: Per-frame map command executor (table 0x30780) + effect-TICK handlers (table 0x3088c) + trigger firers + cell/geometry/object state effects + particles. Sub-layers: action handlers / effect ticks / trigger entry firers.

dbase100_interpreter.label: DBASE100 script interpreter
dbase100_interpreter.summary: Threaded DBASE100 bytecode interpreter (0x1d430), record/condition eval, action queue, dialogue script reader, sound/text id resolution.

dialogue_ui.label: Dialogue / inspect / choice UI
dialogue_ui.summary: On-screen inspect popup, choice menu + selection, dialogue/choice text panels, dialogue cursor hit-test, timed (subtitle) messages.

inventory.label: Inventory system
inventory.summary: Inventory grid/panel, item slots & icons, pickup/use/combine/stack, item-label formatting, tab filter.

weapon_combat.label: Weapons & combat
weapon_combat.summary: Weapon arm/fire/aim, viewmodel sprite, projectile spawn & hit damage, weapon HUD/ammo, player-damage application.

entity_ai.label: Dynamic entities / enemy AI
entity_ai.summary: Actor think loop + state machine, entity pools/spawn/destroy, locomotion/aim/attack AI, entity-def cache.

collision_physics.label: Collision & sector physics
collision_physics.summary: Wall/sector/object collision, movement sweep, ray casts, sector locate/search, portal-near queries, distance tests.

player.label: Player movement & camera
player.summary: Player locomotion tick, vertical physics, view bob/turn/camera params, position warp commit.

input.label: Input (keyboard/mouse/keymap)
input.summary: Keyboard int9 + keymap dispatch, key/look/move/turn intent handlers, mouse poll/cursor input, console field editing, input ring.

doors.label: Doors
doors.summary: Door pool, swing geometry & ticks, open/close state, neighbor-sector resolve, near-door queries, door sounds.

automap.label: Automap / overhead map
automap.summary: Overhead map geometry render, player/door/entity markers, line clip + bresenham draw.

map_load.label: Map / level loading
map_load.summary: Raw map + map-DAS load, level metadata (lighting/movement/player pos), raw-state stream (inter-map persistence), warp/transition, object-table init, geometry unload.

savegame.label: Savegame & snapshots
savegame.summary: Savegame read/write, state-chunk serialization (player/entities/object-links/records), slot names + thumbnails, screenshot/LBM snapshot.

menu_hud_ui.label: Menus & HUD chrome
menu_hud_ui.summary: Main/settings/options menus, message boxes, menu widgets + hit-test, HUD panels (health/status/portrait/corner), UI panel image+text compositing.

audio.label: Audio (SOS client / music / SFX / voice)
audio.summary: HMI SOS driver client, MIDI/music sequence, SFX bank + positional sound, voice streaming + dialogue voice, mixer ring buffers.

file_config.label: File loaders & config
file_config.summary: Generic file blob/resource loaders (ROTH.RES/ICONS.ALL/dbase300), INI + cmdline config parse, path/filename helpers, temp-file enumeration.

memory_pool.label: Memory: heap & Pool allocators
memory_pool.summary: Game heap alloc/free, relocatable Pool/handle allocator (magic 'Pool'), resource-chunk pools, block size helpers.

dos_runtime.label: DOS/OS runtime glue (engine-side)
dos_runtime.summary: Engine-side OS glue not in the CRT bucket: spawn/exec, DOS memory blocks, exception/critical-error handlers, timer int8, brk grow, errno mapping, DBCS.

math_util.label: Math / string / shared leaf utilities
math_util.summary: Fixed-point math (isqrt/atan2/sincos), 2D rotate, RNG, clamp/approach, string/format helpers, vsprintf core (shared leaves used everywhere).

game_core.label: Game core / lifecycle / main loop
game_core.summary: Program entry + startup, main sequence, per-frame gameplay loop & frame-step orchestration, new-game reset, database init, frame-time scaling, dev mode.

runtime_support.label: Runtime support (catch-all)
runtime_support.summary: Engine functions not yet attributed to a specific subsystem. Minimize — entries here want a closer look.
